_comment: Machine-readable scoring rules for the Job Scanner Agent. Advisory use only. No auto-apply. No fabricated claims.

criteria: job mentions customer support, client communication, or stakeholder management
job is in FinTech, SaaS, or trading operations domain
job title contains Support, Operations, Technical Account, Customer Success, Helpdesk, Tier 1, Tier 2
job mentions CRM, ticketing systems, or escalation workflows
job does not require a CS degree
job mentions AI tools, automation, or process improvement

tag_descriptions.apply_now: Strong fit. Current portfolio is sufficient to apply. Review and edit cover letter before sending.
tag_descriptions.stretch: Possible fit. Strong cover letter + bridge angle can help. Be honest about gaps.
tag_descriptions.learn_first: Missing 1-2 key skills. Close the gap first, set a timeline, then revisit.
tag_descriptions.skip: Not accessible without fabrication or ineligible. Do not apply. Log reason.
